title: bidens albiflora
intro: Bidens albiflora, also known as the White Beggar's Lice or White Bidens, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to the western United States and parts of Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Bidens albiflora include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
